headline: Correction: GSK sub­si­di­ary ViiV Health­care and Colom­bian reg­u­lat­ors
summary: A pat­ent dis­pute between GSK sub­si­di­ary ViiV Health­care and Colom­bian reg­u­lat­ors is not cur­rently before the Inter­na­tional Centre for Set­tle­ment of Invest­ment Dis­putes in Wash­ing­ton, as wrongly stated in an art­icle on Decem­ber 16. ViiV is con­sid­er­ing its options fol­low­ing a decision by the Andean Com­munity’s dis­pute mech­an­ism in favour of the reg­u­lat­ors
